title: travelsal tools
description:
collection of four tools I made, including hookshot, bow that shoots blocks (blockbow) teleporters and throwable tnt
all of these are craftable in survival and individually toggleable
body:
this datapack adds four items:
- hookshot - bow, that pulls you to hit point (even through terrain!)
- blockbow - bow shooting blocks from offhand
- teleporter creator - throw onto wool to create teleporter
- throwable TNT - throw with Q to make explosions 

recipes can be found in the images tab

all of these can be disabled by using command `/trigger travelsal_settings` to open settings, then clicking on individual settings

there is also resource pack using custom item textures from optifine that retextures all four items above
